# Gold Coast Window and Pressure Cleaning

> Professional exterior cleaning services on the Gold Coast and Northern NSW, Australia.

## About
Gold Coast Window and Pressure Cleaning is a locally owned and operated exterior cleaning company serving all Gold Coast suburbs and Northern NSW (Tweed region). Fully insured with police-checked staff.

## Services and Pricing
All prices are a guide — every property is different. Contact us for a free, no-obligation quote.

- Window Cleaning (interior and exterior, up to 4 stories)
  - Apartments and small offices: $220–$440 (inside and out)
  - Single-storey homes and medium businesses: $385–$550 (includes deep track and screen cleaning)
  - Double-storey homes and larger businesses: $500–$800 (includes deep track and screen cleaning)
  - Large commercial, car dealerships, shopping centres, large homes with lots of glass: $800+ (requires site visit)

- Roof Cleaning (manufacturer-recommended process)
  - Flatter single-storey: from $700
  - Steeper double-storey: up to $1,600
  - Large commercial or 3 storeys+: $1,600+ (requires site visit)
  - Price also depends on how dirty the roof is

- Pressure Cleaning (driveways, paths, patios, pool areas)
  - Average driveway: $220
  - Medium driveway: $440
  - XL driveway: $660+
  - Full home package (driveway, pathways, patio, pool area): around $660

- House & Building Softwash (gentle mould and grime removal)
  - Small single-storey or small office: from $495
  - Large single-storey or small double-storey: $770
  - XL single-storey or large double-storey: $990
  - XL double-storey and beyond: $1,200+

- Gutter Cleaning (includes downpipe checks)
  - Single-storey: $220–$550 depending on size and how full
  - Double-storey: $330–$770 depending on size and how full
  - XL commercial or large homes: $550+

- Solar Panel Cleaning (warranty-safe methods)
  - Starting at $220 (includes first 20 panels)
  - $4–$10 per additional panel depending on quantity and condition

- Solar Panel Bird Proofing (marine-grade mesh installation)
  - $25–$35 per metre (includes roof and solar cleaning, plus supply and installation of mesh)

- Patio Cleaning
  - Included in full home pressure clean package (~$660 covers driveway, pathways, patio, and pool area)
  - Patio-only jobs: contact us for a free quote

## Commercial & Strata
We service commercial buildings, strata complexes, and body corporate properties. $20M public liability, SWMS supplied, after-hours scheduling available.

## Service Area
All Gold Coast suburbs from Coolangatta to Ormeau, plus Gold Coast Hinterland and Northern NSW (Tweed Heads, Kingscliff, and surrounding areas). 81 suburbs covered.

Open 24 hours, 7 days a week

## Ratings
5.0 stars on Google. 2,500+ happy customers served.

## Key Facts
- Fully insured with $20M public liability coverage
- Police-checked staff on every job
- 5.0 stars on Google with 2,500+ happy customers
- Locally owned and operated on the Gold Coast
- Servicing 81 suburbs across the Gold Coast and Northern NSW
- Available 7 days a week, flexible scheduling including after-hours for commercial
- SWMS (Safe Work Method Statements) supplied for all commercial jobs
- All work guaranteed — we return if you're not satisfied

## What Makes Us Different
We're a locally owned Gold Coast company — not a franchise, not a call centre. Every job is done by our own trained, police-checked staff. We use manufacturer-recommended processes for roof cleaning and warranty-safe methods for solar panels. We carry $20M public liability insurance and supply full SWMS documentation for commercial and strata clients. With 2,500+ customers and a 5.0 Google rating, our reputation is built on doing the job right the first time.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does window cleaning cost on the Gold Coast?
A: Window cleaning starts at $220–$440 for most apartments and small offices. Single-storey homes are typically $385–$550 including deep track and screen cleaning. Double-storey homes are $500–$800. Large properties with lots of glass are $800+ and require a site visit. All prices are a guide — contact us for a free quote.

Q: What areas do you service?
A: We service all 81 Gold Coast suburbs from Coolangatta to Ormeau, including the Gold Coast Hinterland, plus Northern NSW including Tweed Heads, Kingscliff, Casuarina, and surrounding areas.

Q: How long does a typical job take?
A: Window cleaning on a standard home takes 1–2 hours. Pressure cleaning a driveway takes about 1 hour. Roof cleaning varies from 2–4 hours depending on size and condition. We'll give you a time estimate when you book.

Q: Are you insured?
A: Yes. We carry $20M public liability insurance and all staff are police-checked. We supply SWMS documentation for commercial and strata work.

Q: Do you clean solar panels without voiding the warranty?
A: Yes. We use pure water and low-pressure methods that are safe for all major solar panel brands and won't void manufacturer warranties.

Q: What's included in the full home pressure cleaning package?
A: Our full home package covers the driveway, pathways, patio, and pool area for around $660. It's the best value way to get the whole exterior done in one visit.

Q: How do I get a quote or book a job?
A: Call us on (07) 5651 2386, email info@gcwindowandpressurecleaning.com.au, or book online at our ServiceM8 booking page. We offer free, no-obligation quotes for all jobs.

Q: How often should I have my property professionally cleaned?
A: Most residential properties benefit from window cleaning every 3–6 months, gutter cleaning once or twice a year, and pressure cleaning annually. Coastal properties near the ocean may need more frequent cleaning due to salt air exposure.
